sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports feeling a burning sensation in his chest, particularly when walking. He describes the chest pain as not severe, and states it goes away if he rests. He also reports nasal congestion due to allergies. The patient reports no recurrent issues with his carpal tunnel.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient's blood pressure is under good control. Oxygenation is within normal limits. A slight three out of six systolic ejection murmur is heard on heart auscultation. No carotid bruits are appreciated. The echocardiogram shows a slightly low pumping function of 45%. Mitral regurgitation is present. The patient has healed surgical scars on his right wrist.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has known coronary artery disease and is experiencing chest pain. The patient has a history of coronary artery disease and a herniated disc.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor ordered a stress test. A lipid panel will be ordered and the patient will start crestor 20 mg once a day. The patient will continue on aspirin and toprol. The doctor ordered a physical exam. Dragon will finalize the note.
